channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Early menarche and later menopause are associated with increased ovarian cancer risk
item.description: 1. Across the premenopausal and postmenopausal groups, early menarche, later menopause, and longer reproductive span were associated with higher ovari...

item.title: 'I wish I could fall asleep and never wake up': Even passive suicidal thoughts are a worryâhere's how to respond
item.description: Suicide is the leading cause of death among Australians aged 15 to 49. Approximately one in eight Australians have seriously considered suicide.

item.title: Combining GLP-1 drugs with hormones may lower uterine cancer risk
item.description: Adding GLP-1 medications like Ozempic to progestin therapy could cut the risk of developing endometrial cancer. A retrospective study published in the...
